description: Accounts in a mixture of Judaeo-Arabic, Arabic script, and Greek/Coptic numerals, written in multiple hands.Mentions: Mufaḍḍal b. [...]; a half qinṭār of myrrh; Abū l-Faḍl and ʿAbd al-Raḥmān the sons of ʿUmar al-[...] b. Maṭrūḥ; a copy of something (nuskha bi-yad. . . . ); a hundred reams (dast); Abū ʿImrān; Ibn [[Mūsā]] Abū Saʿīd; something defective (? الله عليه عيب); 11 + 1/3 + 1/4 of something called "Ibrāhīmī"; 2 dinars weighing 2 dinars less half a qirat; and Abū Zikrī.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
